title: OptimizedSMP
description:
~Snappy!~

Includes all optimization mods and some of the most essential beautification mods and planning tools (Distant Horizons, Litematica). Also includes Simple Voice Chat for playing with friends.
body:
### _Pack Description_
This pack includes a carefully selected set of optimization mods to keep your server running smoothly, paired with beautification enhancements to improve visuals without compromising performance. Designed specifically for small-scale SMP servers, it strikes the perfect balance between efficiency and aesthetics. Completely Vanilla friendly (i define that as 'if i remove this pack, can i still run the world in vanilla minecraft?). 

I personally use this setup for my SMP, but feel free to use it for your own server.

### _Credits_
VanillaTweaks is a resource pack configurator website where several smaller packs can be combined into one on a per-player-preference basis. It can be found [here](https://vanillatweaks.net/picker/resource-packs/). Also, the credits for all of the sub-packs can be found at the bottom of the aforementioned page.
